title: Conversation Entries
description: A schema for a conversation structured as a list of entries, compatible with Contact Center Insights.

entries.description: A list of conversation entries or turns.

text.description: The transcribed text of the utterance.

role.description: The role of the participant who spoke.

user_id.description: A numeric identifier for the participant.

start_timestamp_usec.description: The start time of the utterance in microseconds since the Unix epoch.
